title: Phobia's Better Hotbar
description: A resourcepack that gives your hotbar a more modern and clean look
body:
# Phobia's Better Hotbar

A hotbar focused resource pack that adds a more modern and cleaner look to the vanilla hotbar.
If you want a look at what it adds, check the gallery!

Example:


![Me with the resourcepack enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b65bc59a9aaa5320ee54df6c6cc1e9f6bd9aa8e4.png)

There is currently a problem with the offhand in some versions earlier than 1.21! You can use mods that alter the version of servers that you connect to and launch from 1.21, but at the moment I cannot fix this!
